title: Heart of Glass
why_this_song: Heart of Glass by Blondie (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Once I had a love and it was divine
Soon found out I was losing my mind
Seemed like the real thing but I was so blind

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "find" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "find" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "love's" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Soon turned out had a heart of glass
Seemed like the real thing, only to find

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Blondie one question about "Heart of Glass", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Blondie sobre "Heart of Glass", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Heart of Glass" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Heart of Glass" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Heart of Glass" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Heart of Glass" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
